flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mid-America Christian University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.8k → $21.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mid-America Christian University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.8k → $21.3k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mid-America Christian University rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.5k → $26.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mid-America Christian University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
